summary: Add Eckhart Sermons (Field, CCEL) entry to manifest + verify acquire.py (requires T2 done)
description:
Append [[source]] entry to sources/manifest.toml:

id = "eckhart-sermons-field"
tradition = "christian_mysticism"
label = "Meister Eckhart's Sermons (Field translation)"
url = "https://ccel.org/ccel/eckhart/sermons.all.html"
format = "html"
license = "public_domain"
translator = "Claud Field"
notes = "Field 1909 (H.R. Allenson, London), first English translation. Seven sermons aggregated on a single CCEL page. Funkelein (spark of the soul) doctrine — connects to Boehme inner-light material already in corpus."

DEPENDS on T2 (787681d2) — generic_html.py needs 'book-content'/'bbook' selectors before extraction will be clean. Running acquire.py before T2 will produce raw output polluted with CCEL nav chrome.

First non-sacred-texts / non-gnosis.org / non-gutenberg source domain.

resolution.note: Added manifest entry, ran acquire.py, raw/christian_mysticism/eckhart-sermons-field.txt (67556 chars) extracted cleanly via the T2-fixed extractor. No CCEL nav chrome ('Please login', 'loading…' absent). Trailing 'Index of Pages of the Print Edition' is inside CCEL's book-content div — intrinsic to their content, chunker will drop as low-signal. First non-sacred-texts/non-gnosis source domain ingested.
